title: TFC Ruins
description: Adds small ruins & structures to TerraFirmaCraft
body:
![TerraFirmaCraft ruined building](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2JRpLCvK/images/98fa884c75b8dbd91b64712c289f7bdd22b72c1c.png)
Available on [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-ruins) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/tfc-ruins)

Requires: [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft)

### 📖About

**TFC Ruins** is a [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) addon, that adds randomized structures and ruins around the world. Explore numerous houses and buildings left behind by an extinct civilization. Loot vessels full of random loot ranging from simple straw, clay, or animal hides to valuable metal nuggets & even kaolin clay! The structures blend well with the landscape and can be randomly covered with vines, moss, and other vegetation.

### 💬Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-ruins) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/tfc-ruins) modpacks and use this mod in your videos. A link to the mod page in the description is highly appreciated.

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (structures, tags, etc) in other projects, put this mod behind any adfly-like links, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
